candidates.title: Vori Pitch Presentation
candidates.notes: Captured a segment of Vori's pitch presentation, showcasing dynamic fundraising graphics.

shots.research_notes: I searched for media related to Vori's social media presence, particularly focusing on their Instagram account for behind-the-scenes event videos. The page requires login to access specific content, but I recorded a capture of the page to obtain the event footage later. The recording includes a summary of the Vori account, which is essential for the targeted shot showing investors and team members at an event.

candidates.title: Instagram Capture of Vori

shots.research_notes: I searched for media relevant to Vori's founders interacting after the startup went viral and targeted their official Instagram page. I found suitable videos and recorded a segment showcasing their startup culture.

shots.research_notes: I found a relevant promotional video on YouTube demonstrating Vori's application in use at a bodega, which matches the shot's requirements. Additionally, I retrieved logo and cover images from Vori's LinkedIn page. Further attempts to fetch additional media from Vori's official site and other sources did not yield any images or videos.
